required_evidence: A current official SAMRIDH cohort notice or application portal explicitly accepting applications.
review_notes: Do not reuse the historical MSH logo URL. Any valid application URL must belong to a separately governed cohort or call.

required_evidence: Official cohort-specific accelerator application checklist or current Expression-of-Interest document.
review_notes: Document requirements may differ by cohort and must not be inferred from the permanent scheme document alone.

required_evidence: Official extension, closure, continuation or revised-duration document for the permanent SAMRIDH scheme.
review_notes: Current information availability does not prove that the original scheme duration remains operational.

required_evidence: Official current SAMRIDH or cohort-specific contact details.
review_notes: A general MSH contact must not be represented as a scheme-specific contact without explicit evidence.

required_evidence: Official MeitY order extending, renewing or replacing the approved TIDE 2.0 implementation period.
review_notes: Historical status remains correct unless an official continuation or extension document is found.

required_evidence: Official historical centre-level startup application or selection checklist.
review_notes: This does not block preservation of the historical scheme identity.

required_evidence: Official archival or programme contact, if still maintained.
review_notes: Individual incubation-centre contacts must not be presented as a single central scheme contact.
